annotations.note: Reading a tab's privileged url (even the add-on's OWN moz-extension:// url), title, or favIconUrl - or filtering tabs.query by them - needs "tabs", a host permission matching the tab's url, or "activeTab".
Since Thunderbird 154 the add-on's OWN moz-extension:// pages are exempt: reading or filtering by their url, title, or favIconUrl needs no permission.
